members.name: Olga Rubanov
members.title: Founder
members.shortBio: Founder of HODA Wellness Group. Doctoral candidate in Functional Medicine, specializing in Polyvagal Theory and the Focusing technique.
members.fullBio:
With nearly three decades of executive leadership experience in technology and consulting, Olga is also a doctoral candidate in Functional Medicine, has studied Polyvagal Theory and its applications, and specializes in the Focusing technique.

She is passionate about practicing the same principles she teaches to support long-term vitality and well-being.
credentials: Trained in Polyvagal Theory and its applications

members.name: Anna Rabinovich, DNP, APRN, ANP-BC, CDCES
members.title: Nurse Practitioner
members.shortBio: Board-certified Adult Nurse Practitioner with two decades of experience across endocrinology, diabetes management, and primary care.
members.fullBio:
Anna is a board-certified Adult Nurse Practitioner with two decades of experience in endocrinology, diabetes management, and primary care, practicing across hospital, clinic, and telehealth settings.

She specializes in managing complex chronic conditions through a holistic, patient-centered approach and the integration of advanced technologies.
credentials: APRN, ANP-BC — Board-certified Adult Nurse Practitioner
CDCES — Certified Diabetes Care and Education Specialist

members.name: Eugenia Kobylatsky, M.Sc.
members.title: Registered Dietitian
members.shortBio: Registered Dietitian and author of 4 books on nutrition and weight management, with two decades of experience.
members.fullBio:
Eugenia is the author of 4 books on nutrition and weight management, with two decades of experience as a Registered Dietitian.

She specializes in disease prevention, cardiovascular health, type 2 diabetes, and sustainable weight control — translating complex scientific research into practical, personalized nutrition that fits everyday meals.
credentials: Author of 4 books on nutrition and weight management

members.name: Jack Johnston
members.title: Personal Trainer
members.shortBio: NASM-Certified Personal Trainer with 20+ years in fitness, performance, and corrective exercise.
members.fullBio:
Jack has over 20 years of experience in fitness, performance, and corrective exercise.

Specializing in longevity-focused training, human performance, and movement optimization, he helps clients build strength, improve function, and achieve sustainable long-term results through evidence-based coaching.
